creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jason,

thanks for submitting this update but unfortunately I found some issues
during staging and a "make check-orphans" reports the following:

Error: Orphaned: %%ETCDIR%%.cfg
Error: Orphaned: %%ETCDIR%%.lss
Error: Orphaned: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/docs/README.release
Error: Orphaned: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/samples/oldlynx.bat
Error: Orphaned: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/test/circle.html
Error: Orphaned: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/test/square.html
Error: Orphaned: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/test/triangle.html
Error: Orphaned: share/locale/eo/LC_MESSAGES/lynx.mo

Could you please check the port's plist?

Thanks,
Frederic
